title: Maps & Directions - DKU
description: How to get to Duke Kunshan university and explore the DKU campus, follow the maps & directions.
text:
Maps & Directions
Maps & Directions
Getting to Duke Kunshan
The closest airports to our campus are in Shanghai and Wuxi, while daily high-speed rail services stop at Kunshan South Railway Station. The city also has a comprehensive public transportation network including buses, taxis and shared bicycles.
Here’s a step-by-step guide on how to reach us.
BY AIR
Shanghai Pudong International Airport (PVG) is 92 kilometers east of Kunshan.
Option 1: Travel on Shanghai Metro Line 2 to Hongqiao Railway Station. From here, take a 20-minute high-speed train to Kunshan South Railway Station. A taxi or public bus (Nos. 22 or 31) will take you to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1 to 2 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 50-80
Option 2: Take a taxi from the airport to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1.5 to 2.5 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 600-800
Option 3: Take the airport shuttle to Kunshan City Terminal (services run 8:30 a.m. to 8:45 p.m.). From there, take a taxi to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 2.5 to 3 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 150
Shanghai Hongqiao International Airport (SHA) is 42 kilometers east of Kunshan.
Option 1: Follow the signs to Hongqiao Railway Station and take a 20-minute high-speed train to Kunshan South Railway Station. From here, take a taxi or public bus (Nos. 22 or 31) to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1 to 1.5 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 30-60
Option 2: Take a taxi from the airport to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1.5 hours (subject to traffic)Estimated cost: RMB 200-300
Option 3: Take the airport shuttle from Terminal 2 to Kunshan City Terminal (services run 9:15 a.m. to 9:10 p.m.). From there, take a taxi to Duke Kunshan.
Estimated travel time: 1.5 to 2 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 100-150
Sunan Shuofang International Airport (WUX) is 41 kilometers west of Kunshan.
Option 1: Take a taxi to Wuxi New District Railway Station and take a 30-minute high-speed train to Kunshan South Railway Station. From there, take a taxi or a public bus (Nos. 22 or 31) to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1 to 1.5 hoursEstimated cost: RMB 100-150
Option 2: Take a taxi from the airport to Duke Kunshan.Estimated travel time: 1 hourEstimated cost: RMB 180-250
BY TRAIN
High-speed services stop at Kunshan South Railway Station, about 12 kilometers southeast of Duke Kunshan.
Option 1: TaxiEstimated travel time: 20-30 minutesEstimated cost: RMB 30-35
Option 2: Public busEstimated travel time: 50-60 minutesEstimated cost: RMB 5
Bus services
